feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT error raising when Click Send Mail action but Mail can send
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have implemented a custom RAP action sendMail for business object ZI_PACKINGLISTAPP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The logic is written in a custom class under Source Code Library and is executed from the RAP behavior. The action reads selected records using READ ENTITIES, creates an email using CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE, sets recipient, subject, and HTML body, and then sends the email using lo_mail->send(). However, when the action is triggered from the Fiori app, the OData request fails with runtime error BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT althouthg the email is  sent. We would like to understand why this logic is not working in the RAP context and which part of the implementation is considered illegal by the RAP framework.

 

Below is the implemented logic for reference:

METHOD sendMail.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_packinglistapp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY PackingListApp
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_results).

  LOOP AT lt_results ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_result>).
    DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
    lo_mail->add_recipient( 'xxx@company.com' ).
    lo_mail->set_subject( 'Status Updated' ).
    lo_mail->set_main(
      cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
        iv_content = 'Notice Item ' &&
<fs_result>-OutboundDeliveryID &&  ' updated. '
        iv_content_type = 'text/html'
      )
    ).
    lo_mail->send( ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.

Please clarify why this implementation results in BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT in S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP, and advise the correct SAP-recommended approach for sending emails (and adding attachments) triggered from a RAP action.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS-based Value Help: Company Code filter not prefilled from UI context (expected FR03)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
I created a custom field using the Custom Fields app (Key User Extensibility) in the business context Fixed Asset Master Data.
For value selection, I created a CDS-based value help using a consumption view entity with ObjectModel.dataCategory: VALUE_HELP.

Requirement
When the user opens the value help from the UI, the Company Code field in the value help dialog (restriction/filter area) should be automatically prefilled from the UI context.
Example: In the asset master screen, the Company Code is VR03, so the value help should open with Company Code = VR03 already set.

Actual behavior
The value help opens, but Company Code is empty in the restriction area, and the user has to manually enter VR03.
 
@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'GL Local Dimension Assignment'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@ObjectModel.dataCategory: #VALUE_HELP
@Search.searchable: true
@Consumption.ranked: true
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #VALUE_HELP_PROVIDER
define view entity YC_GLLOCALDIMENASSIGNVH
  as select from YI_GlLocalDimensionAssign
{
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CompanyCode'
  .defaultSearchElement: true
  key CompanyCode,

  @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
  .defaultSearchElement: true
  key Assignment1,

  _Text,

  @Consumption.hidden: true
  _CompanyCode
}<br /><br />
Questions
How can I pass the UI context (Company Code) into a CDS-based value help created for a custom field?
Is there any annotation required (for example binding, filter mapping, or context inheritance) so the value help automatically uses the company code from the UI?
Is this context inheritance supported for Key User Extensibility custom fields, or do I need a different approach (for example a parameterized view, another value help type, or different extensibility mechanism)?
Any guidance or best practices would be highly appreciated.
Thank you

entry.title: Creating Number Range Objects in SAP BTP Trial Account?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m currently working in an SAP BTP Trial Account and I need to create and manage Number Range Objects for my application.

In on-premise SAP systems (like S/4HANA or ECC), we typically use transactions such as SNRO to create number range objects. However, I’m unsure how this is handled in the SAP BTP Trial environment.

Specifically, I would like to understand:

  • Is it possible to create Number Range Objects directly in SAP BTP Trial?

  • Are there any trial account limitations?

     

    Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: EU Access only in developer hub register
entry.content:
Hi Team 

It's possible to register under the Developer Hub but only considering EU access only ?

Many thanks

João

entry.title: CDHDR table performance issue.
entry.content:
As per the current requirement, we need to retrieve change document records based only on OBJECTCLAS and UDATE. In our current object, there is no scope to pass additional key fields such as OBJECTID or CHANGENR. Due to the large volume of data in CDHDR, fetching records using only OBJECTCLAS and UDATE is causing performance concerns.

Could you please suggest any suitable SAP standard function module, API, or recommended approach to efficiently fetch CDHDR data based on OBJECTCLAS and UDATE without impacting system performance? Also, kindly advise if there are any best practices or alternative solutions to handle this requirement.

entry.title: Issue with Updating Operation wise Confirmation Time via RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP application where we have implemented a custom field called “Execution Time” as per the business requirement.

The requirement is to update the execution time operation wise in the standard transaction CO03. For this purpose, we are using EML with I_ProductionOrderConfirmationTP to update the fields OpConfirmedWorkQuantity1 and OpConfirmedWorkQuantity2, which are intended to store the time values.

We have written the necessary logic to update both quantity and time using the same EML statement. However, the changes are not getting reflected as expected in the system.

For your reference, we have also attached a snapshot of the Time field along with the relevant code.

Could you please review and suggest if there is an alternative approach or any correction required to achieve the desired update?

Best Regards,

Thank you,

READ ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
EXECUTE getconfproposal
FROM VALUE #(( confirmationgroup = lv_opconf
             %param-confirmationyieldquantity = <lfs_childbillet>-totalweight
            ) )
        RESULT DATA(lt_confproposal)
        REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_conf).

LOOP AT lt_confproposal ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_confproposal>).
APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_confirmation ASSIGNING FIELD SYMBOL(<ls_confirmation>).
       <ls_confirmation>-%cid = 'Conf' && sy-tabix.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ls_confproposal>-%param ).
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-ConfirmedExecutionStartTime = lv_start_ts.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-ConfirmedExecutionEndTime   = lv_end_ts.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-finalconfirmationtype = 'X'.

 READ ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
      ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
      EXECUTE getgdsmvtproposal
FROM VALUE #( ( confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup
            %param-confirmationyieldquantity =  <lfs_childbillet>-totalweight
            ) )
      RESULT DATA(lt_gdsmvtproposal)
      REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_gdsmvt).
      CHECK lt_gdsmvtproposal[] IS NOT INITIAL.
      CLEAR lt_target[].
      DELETE lt_gdsmvtproposal[] WHERE %param-quantityinentryunit IS INITIAL.

        LOOP AT lt_gdsmvtproposal ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_gdsmvtproposal>)
        WHERE confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup .
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_target>).
       
        <ls_target> = CORRESPONDING #( <ls_gdsmvtproposal>-%param ).
        <ls_target>-%cid = 'Item' && sy-tabix.
        ENDLOOP.

  APPEND VALUE #( %cid_ref = <ls_confirmation>-%cid
                  %target = lt_target
  confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup ) TO lt_matldocitm.

      ENDLOOP.

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
      ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
      CREATE FROM lt_confirmation
      CREATE BY \_prodnordconfmatldocitm FROM lt_matldocitm
      MAPPED DATA(poconfirmmapped)
      FAILED DATA(poconfirmfailed)
      REPORTED DATA(poconfirmreported).

    ENDIF.

entry.title: Develop custom report in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Version 2602.0.59 and would like to develop a custom report within the system. Could you please guide me on the required steps to achieve this?

Any insights, best practices, or resources on how to approach this task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your responses!

Best regards,
Harshita

entry.title: Archiving strategy for CDS-based AFO reports in S/4HANA
entry.content:
In our ECC landscape, we have  implemented an archiving solution using a custom utility class and ZARIX tables based on Info Structures to support reporting and meet performance requirements.

With the transition to S/4HANA, our reporting is now based on Analysis for Office (AFO) using CDS views. 

What approaches are you using for archiving or data aging for data consumed by CDS views? How do you enable access to historical or archived data in AFO reports within S/4HANA?

We would greatly appreciate insights and experiences from the community regarding practical and scalable solutions in S/4HANA environments.

Thank you in advance for sharing your knowledge and recommendations.

entry.title: Debugging AMDP through centralized Firefighter from GRC
entry.content:
Our SAP system is on HANA 2023, and we have developed many AMDPs to meet our business requirements. The issue we are facing involves debugging AMDPs in the Production environment. Since AMDP debugging is supported only through Eclipse (ADT) and not through SAP GUI, it becomes a challenge.

As per our process, we have centralized Firefighter access. We log on to the GRC Production environment and then access the target system using transaction code GRAC_EAM, which opens only in the SAP GUI. In short, because the Firefighter session only provides GUI access, we are unable to debug AMDPs in Production.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Adobe Forms: How to Control Line Item Layout Using a Header Flag?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on an SAP Adobe Form in S/4HANA Public Cloud. A custom header-level flag field is sent from ABAP and correctly bound to a header field, and the value prints correctly in the PDF output. This flag is used in JavaScript (calculate event) on a repeating line-item subform to control line-item layout behaviour such as visibility or page breaks, based on the current line-item index. The script is placed on a subform.

The logic works correctly in Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ADLC) preview, but after uploading the form and executing it in SAP runtime via transaction code, the conditions do not work. The flag value is available and prints correctly, no JavaScript errors occur, but the line-item layout changes are ignored.

What is the correct SAP-supported way to control line-item layout based on a header-level flag in Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to maintain decision table in BRF+ for business user
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have create a BRF+ onject where I have used BRF+ decision table.

What is options available to maintan decision table without opening BRF+ tool? 

I need some help on this.

Thanks

entry.title: ATC Check Error: "Program does not exist"
entry.content:
Hello - need help understanding some ATC check errors.

We our testing out some source code of ours developed in our SAP Public Cloud instance which we then imported via gCTS to our S4 2025 on-premise system.

We ran the ABAP_CC_CERTIFICATION ATC check variant for clean clore compatability. However, we have ran into a few errors with object type WAPA .

It looks like it points to the BSP application object. We have a few of these for our Fiori Applications. We were able to get around these errors by deleting the BSP application obejcts in our on-prem system first. Then we re-deployed the Fiori apps directly to the on-prem system instead of deploying to cloud -> gCTS -> on-prem. This seemed to re-create the BSP objects and clear the errors. 

Seems that when we imported from Public Cloud -> gCTS -> on-prem there were issues with the BSP objects imported. It seems to happen to a few of our Fiori apps, but not all of them. Anybody know why this would happen?

entry.title: Is there a released BADi to modify item-level tax code during MIRO
entry.content:
We have a requirement to modify the item-level tax code (MWSKZ) during MIRO processing (Logistics Invoice Verification).

Scenario:

Transaction: MIRO

Tax code is derived from PO / condition technique

Based on a specific business rule (condition type), we need to override the tax code at item level before posting.

We are looking for a released enhancement spot / BAdI to safely implement this logic.

So far, we have checked the following BAdIs in our system:

MRM_CHECK

MRM_MRIS_IDAT_MODIFY

MRM_ITEM_CUSTFIELDS

MRM_HEADER_CHECK

However, we could not find a suitable released BAdI that allows modification of item-level tax code before posting.

Questions:

Is there a released BAdI to modify item-level tax code during MIRO?

Or is tax determination expected to be controlled only via configuration?

If not via BAdI, what would be the recommended enhancement approach?

Below are the BADi present in my system

entry.title: CPI should call a report (with Selection-Screen) in S/4.How to make it a RAP ABAP Object.
entry.content:
A report (with Selection-Screen) needs to be called by CPI, how to achieve the same using RAP ABAP (I'm new to the Language). I can make the report being called in Class using SUBMIT and using AI figured the class can be called in CDS Entity.

Can someone refer me to a document, which can make me achieve the object.

People can use a simple example to explain the process.

entry.title: Technical Issue: Authentication Popup in SAP Build Work Zone (Destination: abap-cloud-default)
entry.content:
I am currently encountering a persistent "Sign in" authentication prompt while accessing the "Simple App" within the SAP Build Work Zone (Trial environment).

Despite having the destination abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-fae783bdtrial-dev configured with OAuth2UserTokenExchange, the application is requesting manual credentials instead of passing the SSO token.

Technical Details:

  • Destination Name: abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-fae783bdtrial-dev

  • Authentication Type: OAuth2UserTokenExchange

  • Error Manifestation: Pop-up requesting Username/Password for the ABAP instance URL.

 Has anyone encountered this or found a solution? I would appreciate any insights. Thank you in advance!








_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: sample
description: Generated by Fiori Tools
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: sample-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: sample-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: sample-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: sample-repo-host-key
  - name: sample-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: sample-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: sample_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: sample-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: sample-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: sample
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: sample_uaa
          ServiceInstanceName: sample-xsuaa-service
          ServiceKeyName: sample-uaa-key
          sap.cloud.service: sample
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: sample-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: sample-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - sample.zip
      name: sample
      target-path: resources/
- name: sample
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: sample-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: sample-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: sample-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: sample-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: sample-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: sample-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

entry.title: What's the best way to sync two documents related to each other?
entry.content:
I have a Sales Document made using "Create with reference". Is it possible that when I update some of standard fields of reference document, the fields in Sales Document will also updated? I want them to be in sync.

I tried to use BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE and put the logic inside MV45AFZZ - USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE. 

While it is success as per the return table in the BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE, the changes did not reflect.

I'm using VA42 to update the reference document. 

 

Lastly, is it possible to also update the custom vbak and vbap fields using that BAPI?

entry.title: Business has a custom line item numbering for Sales Document. Which userexit is the best to sort it?
entry.content:
Business has a custom line item number in which is have 4 level of line items and the issue is the lowest level line item has the lowest numbering which starts at 1 and ends at 19999.

This is what SAP displays in VA02. However, the user expects that it will be sorted according to level.

LEVELPOSNRUEPOS
4000010
1200000
22050020000
32050120500
1400000
1600000

Expected output:

LEVELPOSNRUEPOS
1200000
22050020000
32050120500
40000120501
1400000
1600000

I have tried to manipulate IVBAP in SAPMV45A FCODE_BEARBEITEN. While it is showing the correct results, it is causing runtime error.

Any tips if there is a better approach for this without causing an performance issue?

entry.title: CDS-Based OData 2.0 – Power BI Service Returns Status Code 400 (Invalid Credentials) for Production
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are experiencing an issue with a CDS-based OData service (auto-published via @odata.publish: true) when connecting from Power BI Service.

System & Technical Info:

  • OData Version: 2.0

  • Authentication Type: Basic Authentication

  • Same User ID used in both clients

  • User authorizations confirmed identical (Full Access)

Issue Details:

  • Client 300 (Production) – Power BI Service: Fails with “Failed to update data source credentials: The credentials provided for the OData source are invalid. Status Code: 400.”

  • Client 300 – Power BI Desktop: Works without issues

  • Client 180 (Development) – Power BI Service & Desktop: Works without issues

  • OData URLs (Client 180 & 300): Both accessible and responsive

Checks Performed:

  • No authorization errors in SU53

  • No relevant errors in /IWFND/ERROR_LOG

  • Roles and authorizations between clients verified identical

Question:
Has anyone encountered a situation where a CDS-based OData service works in Power BI Desktop, works in Power BI Service for one client, but fails in Power BI Service for another client with Status Code 400?

Which additional checks would you recommend for:

  • CDS OData activation consistency

  • /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE registration

  • SICF node configuration differences

  • Client-specific security or profile parameters

  • Basic Authentication handling in Power BI Service

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Service Definition based on Consumption CDS View (BOPF-Based CDS View)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am curious if it is possible to create a Service Definition based on the BOPF-based consumption CDS View? This would be theoretically an easier way to create and publish OData V2 or V4 services in SAP, but still not replacing all the backbone from the old programming mode for SAP Fiori to ABAP Restful Programming Model (RAP).

I tried this on an SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS00 system and the service definition and service binding could be created and activated without any problems, but later one when checking the metadata of the new OData V4 service I am receiving some strange issues regarding a quantity field and its unit of measure

Unit code property 'DAIRYDELIVPROPOSALBASEQTY' not found in complex type 'CT_B93A2928B399FBCED4EC7994740'

it is quite strange since for me the related annotations are properly defined in the consumption CDS View.

Is anyone tried this out and maybe could confirm if this is working or not?

Many thanks,
Catalin

entry.title: IR027 IN PRODUCTION ORDER CONFIRMATION
entry.content:
Dear Team,

During the production order confirmation process, we are encountering the below mentioned error while performing a partial confirmation. Could you please advise if there is a solution to resolve this issue?
